case_title: DEPARTMENT STORES NATIONAL BANK VS. REMY FLORES

docket_entries.description: RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DEPARTMENT STORES NATIONAL BANK AS TO DEFENDANT FLORES, REMY
